purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.
source: raw/sources/Photographs of the 1929 Geneva Convention showing Dario Jose Pulgar-Arriagada ICRC Audiovisual archives_files/V-P-HIST-03583-07A.JPG

visual_regions.caption_literal: A group of men and women gathered outdoors, with a building covered in ivy in the background and a table with drinks to the right.
visual_regions.source_context: A black and white photograph showing a group of people, mostly men, dressed in formal attire, standing on a gravel path in front of an ivy-covered building. A table with beverages and glasses is visible on the right side of the image.
visual_regions.source: raw/sources/Photographs of the 1929 Geneva Convention showing Dario Jose Pulgar-Arriagada ICRC Audiovisual archives_files/V-P-HIST-03583-07A.JPG
